tasks.label: Android: Start Pixel_4 Only
tasks.command: SDK_ROOT="${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}"; ADB="$SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb"; if ! "$ADB" devices | grep -q "emulator-"; then open -na "Android Emulator" --args -avd Pixel_4 >/tmp/pixel4.log 2>&1; fi; echo 'Waiting for emulator boot (max 180s)...'; for i in {1..180}; do if "$ADB" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^1$'; then break; fi; sleep 1; done; if ! "$ADB" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^1$'; then echo 'Emulator boot timeout. Check /tmp/pixel4.log'; exit 1; fi; "$ADB" devices

tasks.label: Android: Start Pixel_4 + Install Debug
tasks.command: SDK_ROOT="${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-$HOME/Library/Android/sdk}"; ADB="$SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb"; if ! "$ADB" devices | grep -q "emulator-"; then open -na "Android Emulator" --args -avd Pixel_4 >/tmp/pixel4.log 2>&1; fi; echo 'Waiting for emulator boot (max 180s)...'; for i in {1..180}; do if "$ADB" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^1$'; then break; fi; sleep 1; done; if ! "$ADB" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^1$'; then echo 'Emulator boot timeout. Check /tmp/pixel4.log'; exit 1; fi; cd mobile && ./gradlew installDebug
